properties.name: oauth2.username-parameter-name
properties.description: Request parameter name for the username.

properties.name: oauth2.password-parameter-name
properties.description: Request parameter name for the password.

properties.name: oauth2.phone-parameter-name
properties.description: Request parameter name for the phone number.

properties.name: oauth2.sms-code-parameter-name
properties.description: Request parameter name for the SMS verification code.

properties.name: oauth2.email-parameter-name
properties.description: Request parameter name for the email address.

properties.name: oauth2.email-code-parameter-name
properties.description: Request parameter name for the email verification code.

properties.name: oauth2.sms-code-length
properties.description: Length of the SMS verification code.

properties.name: oauth2.sms-code-time-to-live
properties.description: Validity period of the SMS verification code using Spring duration syntax.

properties.name: oauth2.sms-code-resend-interval
properties.description: Minimum resend interval for SMS verification codes using Spring duration syntax.

properties.name: oauth2.email-code-length
properties.description: Length of the email verification code.

properties.name: oauth2.email-code-time-to-live
properties.description: Validity period of the email verification code using Spring duration syntax.

properties.name: oauth2.email-code-resend-interval
properties.description: Minimum resend interval for email verification codes using Spring duration syntax.

properties.name: oauth2.max-login-failures
properties.description: Maximum consecutive login failures before lockout.

properties.name: oauth2.login-lock-duration
properties.description: Lock duration after too many login failures using Spring duration syntax.

properties.name: oauth2.jwt-public-key-location
properties.description: Location of the JWT public key.

properties.name: oauth2.jwt-private-key-location
properties.description: Location of the JWT private key.
